Headline: #84 Peterson Temporary Westbound Reroute near Bryn Mawr/Ridge
ShortDescription: WB 84 Peterson buses are temporarily rerouted via Bryn Mawr, Broadway, Hollywood, Ridge, and over normal route, due to street blockage near Bryn Mawr/Ridge.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #84 Peterson buses are temporarily rerouted via Bryn Mawr, Broadway, Hollywood, Ridge, and over normal route, due to street blockage near Bryn Mawr/Ridge.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
